name: Get all Job Statuses for the Divisions

content.query:
SELECT
job.[Division]
,job.[LP_JobStatusID]
,jbs.[LP_JobStatusCategoryID]
,jbs.[JobStatus]
,jsc.[JobStatusCategory]
,jbs.[Active]
,count(1) as JobCount
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_JOB] job
 ,[EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS] jbs
 ,[EDW].[DIM_JOB_STATUS_CATEGORY] jsc
 where
 job.JobStatusID = jbs.JobStatusID
 and jbs.JobStatusCategoryID = jsc.JobStatusCategoryID
group by
job.[Division]
,job.[LP_JobStatusID]
,jbs.[LP_JobStatusCategoryID]
,jbs.[JobStatus]
,jsc.[JobStatusCategory]
,jbs.[Active]
order by
job.Division
,count(1)
